Sandbox_IK_MP: IKappaID's True Real World Vehicle Physics (Multiplayer)
Sandbox_IK_MP_Enabled_tooltip: Turn on the improved vehicle physics and handling.
Sandbox_IK_MP_EnableProfileTune_tooltip: Automatically adjust stats based on the car type (like Sport, Sedan, or Truck).
Sandbox_IK_MP_DebugLogging_tooltip: Show extra info in logs to help find problems. Leave off unless asked.
Sandbox_IK_MP_PowerMult_tooltip: Make all car engines stronger or weaker.
Sandbox_IK_MP_AccelerationMult_tooltip: How fast cars reach their top speed.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SportPowerBias_tooltip: Extra power boost just for sports and race cars.
Sandbox_IK_MP_HeavyPowerBias_tooltip: Extra power boost for trucks, vans, and SUVs.
Sandbox_IK_MP_BrakeStopTimeMult_tooltip: Higher values make stops feel softer and take longer.
Sandbox_IK_MP_BrakeCreepMult_tooltip: How strongly brakes hold the car at very low speed. 1.0 = default.
Sandbox_IK_MP_MassMult_tooltip: Make all vehicles heavier or lighter.
Sandbox_IK_MP_MassUpliftMult_tooltip: Prevents cars from becoming too heavy and looking weird.
Sandbox_IK_MP_EnableHandlingTune_tooltip: Allow the mod to change how cars turn and lean.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SuspensionFirmness_tooltip: Higher makes the ride stiffer; lower makes it bouncier.
Sandbox_IK_MP_WheelGripMult_tooltip: How well the tires stick to the road.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SteeringResponseMult_toolt: How quickly the car reacts when you turn the wheel.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SteeringClampMult_tooltip: How far the wheels can turn.
Sandbox_IK_MP_BodyRollMult_tooltip: How much the car tilts when turning.
Sandbox_IK_MP_EnableTrunkTune_tooltip: Allow the mod to change trunk sizes.
Sandbox_IK_MP_TrunkCapacityMult_tooltip: Make all trunks bigger or smaller.
Sandbox_IK_MP_EnableTowAssist_tooltip: Gives cars extra power when pulling a trailer.
Sandbox_IK_MP_TowAssistFactor_tooltip: How much extra power you get when towing.
Sandbox_IK_MP_EnableReverseTowAssist_too: Extra power when backing up with a trailer.
Sandbox_IK_MP_TowReverseAssistMult_toolt: How much help you get when reversing.
Sandbox_IK_MP_TowLowSpeedBoost_tooltip: Extra push when starting to pull a heavy load from a stop.
Sandbox_IK_MP_TowAccelSoftness_tooltip: Makes pulling a trailer feel more natural and less jerky.
Sandbox_IK_MP_TowMaxLoadRatio_tooltip: How much weight a car can pull compared to its own weight.
Sandbox_IK_MP_YieldTowToCSR_tooltip: If you use the 'Common Sense Reborn' mod, this lets it handle towing help instead.
Sandbox_IK_MP_CompactPowerBias_tooltip: Tweaks engine power for small cars and light hatchbacks. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_CompactAccelBias_tooltip: Tweaks acceleration for small cars and light hatchbacks. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_CompactBrakeBias_tooltip: Tweaks brakes for small cars and light hatchbacks. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_CompactGripBias_tooltip: Tweaks tire grip for small cars and light hatchbacks. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_CompactMassBias_tooltip: Tweaks weight for small cars and light hatchbacks. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_CompactSteeringBias_toolti: Tweaks steering for small cars and light hatchbacks. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_CompactRollBias_tooltip: Tweaks body lean for small cars and light hatchbacks. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_CompactSuspensionBias_tool: Tweaks suspension for small cars and light hatchbacks. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_StandardPowerBias_tooltip: Tweaks engine power for everyday sedans and general traffic. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_StandardAccelBias_tooltip: Tweaks acceleration for everyday sedans and general traffic. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_StandardBrakeBias_tooltip: Tweaks brakes for everyday sedans and general traffic. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_StandardGripBias_tooltip: Tweaks tire grip for everyday sedans and general traffic. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_StandardMassBias_tooltip: Tweaks weight for everyday sedans and general traffic. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_StandardSteeringBias_toolt: Tweaks steering for everyday sedans and general traffic. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_StandardRollBias_tooltip: Tweaks body lean for everyday sedans and general traffic. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_StandardSuspensionBias_too: Tweaks suspension for everyday sedans and general traffic. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SportAccelBias_tooltip: Tweaks acceleration for sports cars, race cars, and performance vehicles. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SportBrakeBias_tooltip: Tweaks brakes for sports cars, race cars, and performance vehicles. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SportGripBias_tooltip: Tweaks tire grip for sports cars, race cars, and performance vehicles. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SportMassBias_tooltip: Tweaks weight for sports cars, race cars, and performance vehicles. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SportSteeringBias_tooltip: Tweaks steering for sports cars, race cars, and performance vehicles. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SportRollBias_tooltip: Tweaks body lean for sports cars, race cars, and performance vehicles. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_SportSuspensionBias_toolti: Tweaks suspension for sports cars, race cars, and performance vehicles. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_HeavyAccelBias_tooltip: Tweaks acceleration for trucks, vans, buses, and SUVs. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_HeavyBrakeBias_tooltip: Tweaks brakes for trucks, vans, buses, and SUVs. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_HeavyGripBias_tooltip: Tweaks tire grip for trucks, vans, buses, and SUVs. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_HeavyMassBias_tooltip: Tweaks weight for trucks, vans, buses, and SUVs. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_HeavySteeringBias_tooltip: Tweaks steering for trucks, vans, buses, and SUVs. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_HeavyRollBias_tooltip: Tweaks body lean for trucks, vans, buses, and SUVs. 1.0 = no extra change.
Sandbox_IK_MP_HeavySuspensionBias_toolti: Tweaks suspension for trucks, vans, buses, and SUVs. 1.0 = no extra change.
